title: Flagler College Grad Photo Sessions
excerpt: Skip the awkward poses and stiff smiles. Our Flagler College grad photo sessions are relaxed, fun, and designed to capture the real you at one of Florida's most beautiful campuses.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Flagler College graduate celebrating with diploma raised in front of historic brick columns

banner.alt: Joyful Flagler College graduate laughing by the fountain at Ponce Hall

content.alt: Flagler College graduate posing by the Ponce de Leon statue at campus entrance
content.caption: The Ponce de Leon statue is one of many iconic spots we'll capture

content.alt: Joyful Flagler College graduate laughing candidly during photo session
content.caption: Real moments, real smiles - no forced poses here

content.alt: Flagler College graduate walking through lush garden pathway on campus
content.caption: The campus gardens provide a natural, relaxed setting

content.alt: Flagler College graduate with guitar showing personal interests during grad photo session
content.caption: Bring props that show your personality - we love making sessions unique

seo.title: Flagler College Graduation Photography | Stress-Free Grad Photos | First Sight Films
seo.description: Book your Flagler College graduation photos with a fellow Flagler alum. Relaxed 1-hour sessions at $300 for 15 edited images. Golden hour sessions at Ponce Hall, the Rotunda, and more.
